title: MAST Dept. Summer Research
text: Keep an eye on the calendar for updates about seminars, workshops, and social events. Events fall into three categories: MAST events hosted by the Math and Stat department; URO events hosted by the Undergraduate Research Office, and workshops hosted by the library (Lib).
